title: cineraria scandens
intro: Cineraria scandens, also known as the climbing cineraria or scrambling cineraria, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of cineraria scandens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
